category_sources: Official homepage says ITS Tool translates XML documents with PO files using W3C ITS rules.
source_facts.description says it makes XML documents translatable through PO files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is ITS Tool.
docs_sources: Official documentation page lists basic usage, extensions, ITS data categories, ITS and PO, and installation instructions.
Official install page documents installation from releases or git.
repo_sources: GitHub repository About text matches translating XML with PO files using W3C ITS rules.
Official Contribute page states ITS Tool is hosted on GitHub and links to the itstool git repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes XML-to-PO translation using ITS rules.
source_facts.description and executable identify a command-line XML localization tool.
